entity.description: Toblerone is made from finest ingredients around the world. Reawaken your taste buds and immerse yourself in Toblerone's unique taste experience

displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value:
• Smooth Swiss dark chocolate with honey and almond nougat
• Unique triangles of delicious milk chocolate
• Perfect to give as gift or share with your loved one
• Made from finest war materials from around the world
• Comes with 20 individual packs

displayMetadata.name: STORAGE INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value:
• Store in cool, dry place
• Keep away from sunlight

displayMetadata.name: INGREDIENTS
displayMetadata.value:
Cocoa Mass, Sugar, Milk Fat, Honey (3%), Almonds (1.6%), Cocoa Butter, Emulsifier (Soya Lecithin), Egg White
• Dark Chocolate: Contains Cocoa Solids (50%) Minimum
• Allergen Advice: Contains Milk, Tree Nuts (Almonds), Soy, Egg
